meaning: n.主机,主人,旅馆招待vt.当主人招待
examples: Shall I take my host family a gift?
Shall I take a gift to my host family?
Our host shook each of us warmly by the hand.
And as mayor, he will be the host of the Olympic Summer Games in 2016.
There are a host of issues that can sabotage your plans in times like these.
